case_title: O'KELLY & SCHOENLANK CONSULTING ENGINEERS VS FONO PAULETTTE DBA FONO'S BIG SKY RANCH RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,350.00 FILED BY O'KELLY & SCHOENLANK CONSULTING ENGINEERS AS TO DEFENDANT FONO PAULETTTE DBA FONO'S BIG SKY RANCH RESTAURANT FONO LAZLO DBA FONO'S BIG SKY ANCH RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO LAZLO FONO RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'KELLY & SCHOENLANK CONSULTING ENGINEERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONO PAULETTTE DBA FONO'S BIG SKY RANCH RESTAURANT FONO LAZLO DBA FONO'S BIG SKY ANCH RESTAURANT $3,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,370.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FONO PAULETTTE DBA FONO'S BIG SKY RANCH RESTAURANT
